warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: with a buddy
200m jog together
10 worlds greatest stretch
5 Cossack squats per side
10 Ring Rows
10 air squats
6 DB snatch
6 V-ups or Tuck Sits

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
Part A
25 min AMRAP
300m run
20 KB snatches
10m HSW or 2 wall walks
20 T2B
30 box jumps
Part B
3 RFT
3 rope climbs ea
30 Russian KB Swings ea
30 cal row ea

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes posterior chain, core, and grip; horizontal pressing/pulling balances without competing for recovery resources.

siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: AMRAP 25 minutes: Part A, 300m run, 20 KB snatches, 10m HSW or 2 wall walks, 20 T2B. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, back (horizontal), triceps.
